title: Security:  Chrome OS cros_camera_service OOB write in function CameraDeviceAdapter::RegisterBufferLocked
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
  
This bug can be triggered by cros_camera_service's mojo interface which can be accessed from arcvm and chrome browser. So this bug may cause arcvm escape and chrome browser privilege escalation.
